LightningComponentBundle.description: B2B Commerce storefront quote detail: header, totals, and line items with image, code, unit price, editable quantity and live line total, plus a validated Add all to cart.

property.name: heading
property.label: Heading
property.description: Eyebrow label shown above the quote number.

property.name: currencyCode
property.label: Currency code
property.description: ISO currency code used to format prices.

property.name: backPageApiName
property.label: Quote list page API name
property.description: API name of the community page hosting the quote list. Used by the 'Back to quotes' link. Leave blank to use browser back.

property.name: cartPageApiName
property.label: Cart page API name
property.description: API name of the cart page to open after items are added.
